title: Cheboksary, Chuvashia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cheboksary, Chuvashia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cheboksary is a city in Chuvashia with a population of 500,000. The capital of Chuvashia, a Volga River city with a unique Chuvash cultural heritage, modern hydroelectric plant, and scenic waterfront.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
